title: Cemiplimab Plus Chemotherapy Versus Chemotherapy in Advanced NSCLC: 5-Year Results From Phase 3 EMPOWER-Lung 3 Part 2 Trial.
abstract: EMPOWER-Lung 3 part 2 trial demonstrated significant survival benefits with cemiplimab plus chemotherapy versus chemotherapy alone in patients with previously untreated advanced NSCLC without EGFR, ALK, or ROS1 aberrations. Here, we report 5-year follow-up outcomes.
